name: ING Orange Everyday
one_liner: Fee-free everyday account with 1% tap-and-pay cashback and free international ATMs — top pick for newcomers.
benefit: 1% cashback on tap-and-pay (up to ~$30/month when conditions met), no monthly fees, rebated international ATM fees worldwide, and a high-rate Savings Maximiser when paired together.
signup_bonus: No cash signup bonus as of 2026 — value is ongoing cashback + Savings Maximiser bonus interest (check current terms)

how_to_join.action: Apply for ING Orange Everyday online at ing.com.au
how_to_join.detail: You will need your TFN, AU address, and identification documents (passport or driver's licence).

how_to_join.action: Deposit your pay (min $1,000/month) and make 5+ settled card purchases each month
how_to_join.detail: These two conditions activate the 1% cashback and the rebated ATM fee each month.

how_to_join.action: Also open a Savings Maximiser to lock in the bonus interest rate
how_to_join.detail: The high Savings Maximiser bonus rate requires the Orange Everyday conditions to be met each month.

risks: 1% cashback and bonus savings rate both require meeting monthly deposit and transaction conditions
Watch for an introductory savings rate that drops after a few months — re-check the ongoing rate
ING is an online-only bank — all support is via phone or app
est_value: No signup cash, but ~$10–30/month cashback + market-leading Savings Maximiser interest when conditions met
